headline: Pentair plc (PNR) Reports Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.27
summary: Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR) is among the Best Industrial Stocks. On May 4, Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.27 per share, payable August 7, 2026, to shareholders of record on July 24, 2026. This marks the company’s fiftieth consecutive year of dividend growth. On April 28, Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR) reported that first-quarter […]
